market_read: Hardware scarcity remains supported, but platform demand confirmation is weakening. Funding confirmation is partial: fringe borrowers are weaker, but broad hyperscaler credit has not fully deteriorated.

data_health.message: Data retrieval OK. 34 of 34 tickers retrieved. Core tickers available.

interpretation.plain_english: The market may be entering a more fragile late-cycle setup: hardware bottleneck stocks remain strong, but platform demand confirmation is weakening and stress is rising. Funding confirmation is partial: fringe borrowers are weaker, but broad hyperscaler credit has not fully deteriorated.
why: Bottleneck Score is high, meaning hardware scarcity is still being rewarded.
Demand Score is weak/neutral, indicating platform ROI confirmation is lagging.
Stress is rising/high, showing strain in high-beta AI infrastructure or credit proxies.
Funding confirmation is partial: hyperscaler score 44.0, neocloud score 73.0.
watch_next: If Demand falls further, the divergence between hardware providers and their customers widens dangerously.
If Stress continues to spike, the market may transition from a 'squeeze' into outright CAPEX Bubble Fear (D).
Watch whether hyperscaler funding stress moves above 51 and whether issuer-level credit spreads or FCF revisions confirm the market signal.
interpretation.investor_reading: Hardware names may still look strong, but risk is rising because customer-side ROI confirmation is less clear. This environment typically warrants caution and a preference for quality over highly levered beta.

divergence_warnings.message: Hardware bottleneck stocks remain strong while stress is rising. This can resemble a late-cycle squeeze.
Bottleneck strength is narrow. Fewer AI-chain stocks are confirming the move.
Neocloud financing stress is elevated, while broad hyperscaler funding stress is not yet confirmed.

funding_confirmation.summary: Funding confirmation is partial: fringe borrowers are weaker, but broad hyperscaler credit has not fully deteriorated.

warnings.message: Neocloud financing stress is elevated, while broad hyperscaler funding stress is not yet confirmed.

funding_confirmation.methodology: Diagnostic overlay only; it does not alter Demand, Bottleneck, Rotation, Stress, Breadth, or the hard regime classification.
